# Introduction {#sec-intro}

This is the first chapter of the book.

## Section 1.1

Some content in section 1.1. See @fig-cars for an example figure.

```{r}
#| label: fig-cars
#| fig-cap: "A plot of the cars dataset"
plot(cars)
```

## Section 1.2

Some content in section 1.2. We will discuss methods in @sec-methods.
